title: Italian Options Golden Reindeer Stag Grosgrain Ribbon, White Christmas Ribbon for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, Hair Bows, White, Golden Stag Print, 16 mm x 5 Metre Roll
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Each 100% polyester ribbon features golden reindeer stags with jaunty navy scarves on red grosgrain, or red scarves on white grosgrain — adding a festive finishing touch to arts and crafts!

GROSGRAIN DESIGN: This 16 mm x 5 metre grosgrain craft ribbon combines a soft, delicate appearance with a distinctive ribbed pattern running from edge to edge, making it a luxurious addition to any project.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: A must-have for your craft supplies, these grosgrain Christmas ribbons will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, hair bows, gift wrapping, paper crafts, sewing, and garments.

SAFETY ASSURED: Add a sprinkle of magic to every gift and decoration this Christmas with our premium ribbons. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, giving you peace of mind while making every celebration memorable.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
